Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Ivy Machinery.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Ivy Machinery (Nanjing) Co., Ltd. is a highly specialized, medium-scale OEM manufacturer focused on electro-mechanical door systems for public transit and commercial vehicles. Established in 2004 with a solid, fully paid-in capital of 20 million RMB, it operates a legitimate manufacturing facility in the Jiangbei New Area, supported by a verifiable workforce of 74 insured employees (2024). Its core competency lies in the design, production, and software integration of automatic door systems (including platform screen doors for subways/BRT, and vehicle doors/windows for buses and rail transit). Furthermore, it has actively expanded into producing wiring harnesses and connectors for new energy vehicles. This profile confirms it as a robust Tier-2/Tier-3 supplier deeply embedded in the municipal transit and automotive supply chains.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 76)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / SPECIALIZED OEM MANUFACTURING FACILITY
